id: platform.action

## Purpose
Catalog row for a built-in action.

## Rationale
Built at release time; not written by any SDD action.

## Invariants
None beyond Fields constraints.

## Fields

| Field           | Type        | Notes        |
|-----------------|-------------|--------------|
| `id`            | string      | Primary key. |
| `description`   | string      | What it does.|
